extracted_claims: Macro interpretation matters as much as the raw data direction.
09a708f8-9674-4324-abfd-4c57bf4888cb.methodology_summary: Cross-market commentary supported by historical sector-relative performance comparisons.
09a708f8-9674-4324-abfd-4c57bf4888cb.relevance_to_hypothesis: Useful counterweight because it highlights conditional interpretation rather than a one-way macro rule.
09a708f8-9674-4324-abfd-4c57bf4888cb.source: Sell-side or public market strategy research
09a708f8-9674-4324-abfd-4c57bf4888cb.summary: Cooling inflation alone is often insufficient; growth-sensitive outperformance depends on whether the market reads the move as benign easing rather than growth deterioration.
09a708f8-9674-4324-abfd-4c57bf4888cb.title: Sector rotation depends on growth expectations as well as inflation cooling

extracted_claims: Announcement effects are strongest when the surprise component is large.
14e9db00-2115-4fb4-b2a1-efd0b193e52f.methodology_summary: Event-study style measurement around announcement dates.
14e9db00-2115-4fb4-b2a1-efd0b193e52f.relevance_to_hypothesis: Relevant if the hypothesis is framed around CPI prints, labor releases, or other event windows.
14e9db00-2115-4fb4-b2a1-efd0b193e52f.summary: Event-style reactions to macro releases exist, but persistence and sign can vary with the prevailing regime and expectations backdrop.
14e9db00-2115-4fb4-b2a1-efd0b193e52f.title: Macro announcement effects are short horizon and noisy across regimes

extracted_claims: Real-rate moves can affect valuation-sensitive sectors more than the broad market.
b67311ba-2901-49bb-bb0d-25a585d36194.methodology_summary: Empirical macro-finance framing using historical yield and asset-return relationships.
b67311ba-2901-49bb-bb0d-25a585d36194.relevance_to_hypothesis: Directly relevant to Investigate semis versus defensives..
b67311ba-2901-49bb-bb0d-25a585d36194.summary: Falling real yields tend to support duration-sensitive equity segments, though the effect is regime-dependent.
b67311ba-2901-49bb-bb0d-25a585d36194.title: Real-rate sensitivity of long-duration assets

caveats.detail: Regime definitions may be unstable or ex post.
caveats.label: hypothesis_caveat

caveats.detail: Smaller sample sizes can weaken inference.
caveats.label: hypothesis_caveat

457e5563-dcb6-4f72-bc61-c65a5d09b347.expected_direction: stronger and cleaner directional effect within selected regimes
457e5563-dcb6-4f72-bc61-c65a5d09b347.label: regime
457e5563-dcb6-4f72-bc61-c65a5d09b347.mechanism: Transmission strength changes when inflation, policy, or recession risk dominates the narrative.
457e5563-dcb6-4f72-bc61-c65a5d09b347.novelty_usefulness_note: High usefulness for separating unconditional noise from conditional signal.
457e5563-dcb6-4f72-bc61-c65a5d09b347.thesis: The relationship should be stronger in specific macro regimes than in unconditional full-sample analysis.
457e5563-dcb6-4f72-bc61-c65a5d09b347.title: Regime-conditional sensitivity

caveats.detail: Sector composition effects may confound style interpretation.
caveats.label: hypothesis_caveat

caveats.detail: Relative-value framing can hide broad market beta effects.
caveats.label: hypothesis_caveat

dc366c86-f680-497f-818e-d0906a073a00.expected_direction: defensives outperform when the macro signal is interpreted as growth-negative
dc366c86-f680-497f-818e-d0906a073a00.label: counterfactual
dc366c86-f680-497f-818e-d0906a073a00.mechanism: Investors may interpret the macro signal as slower growth rather than lower discount rates.
dc366c86-f680-497f-818e-d0906a073a00.novelty_usefulness_note: Useful falsification card that forces clearer interpretation.
dc366c86-f680-497f-818e-d0906a073a00.thesis: If the primary thesis is wrong, defensive sectors should benefit more than growth-sensitive assets under the same macro shift.
dc366c86-f680-497f-818e-d0906a073a00.title: Counterfactual defensive rotation

dfcec5f5-cc0c-4467-a1cb-743a45e4d1bc.mechanism: Changes in macro expectations alter discount rates and sector-relative earnings expectations.

dfcec5f5-cc0c-4467-a1cb-743a45e4d1bc.thesis: Investigate semis versus defensives. through a measurable macro-to-market transmission channel.
dfcec5f5-cc0c-4467-a1cb-743a45e4d1bc.title: Primary macro transmission
